channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-17746] sanity test_425: (lmv_obd.c:2967:stripe_dirent_load()) ASSERTION( hash <= end ) failed
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for jianyu <yujian@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/4e31a154-f37d-4202-990a-df62e022e0bb

test_425 failed with the following error:

trevis-58vm1 crashed during sanity test_425

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/104137 - 5.14.0-362.18.1.el9_3.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/104137 - 5.14.0-362.18.1_lustre.el9.x86_64

Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark == sanity test 425: lock count should not exceed lru size ========================================================== 01:57:21 \(1712973441\) 
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanity test 425: lock count should not exceed lru size ========================================================== 01:57:21 (1712973441)
LustreError: 1368668:0:(lmv_obd.c:2967:stripe_dirent_load()) ASSERTION( hash <= end ) failed: ctxt@ffff8ac2dbfbdd80 stripe@ffff8ac2dbfbddc8 hash bc7ab96d54688001 end 65f3a26ee3110000
LustreError: 1368668:0:(lmv_obd.c:2967:stripe_dirent_load()) LBUG
CPU: 1 PID: 1368668 Comm: rm Kdump: loaded Tainted: G        W  OE     -------  ---  5.14.0-362.18.1.el9_3.x86_64 #1
Hardware name: Red Hat KVM, BIOS 0.5.1 01/01/2011
Call Trace:
 <TASK>
 dump_stack_lvl+0x34/0x48
 lbug_with_loc.cold+0x5/0x43 [libcfs]
 stripe_dirent_load.isra.0+0x54e/0x5f0 [lmv]
 lmv_striped_read_page+0x1c5/0x7f0 [lmv]
 lmv_read_page+0x3c0/0x480 [lmv]
 ll_get_dir_page+0xc1/0x1f0 [lustre]
 ? _raw_spin_unlock_irqrestore+0xa/0x30
 ? free_unref_page+0x190/0x1e0
 ? __pfx_ll_md_blocking_ast+0x10/0x10 [lustre]
 ll_dir_read+0x2b7/0x4e0 [lustre]
 ll_iterate+0x1de/0x6f0 [lustre]
 iterate_dir+0x17c/0x1c0
 __x64_sys_getdents64+0x80/0x120
 ? __pfx_filldir64+0x10/0x10
 do_syscall_64+0x5c/0x90
 ? do_user_addr_fault+0x1d6/0x6a0
 ? exc_page_fault+0x62/0x150
 entry_SYSCALL_64_after_hwframe+0x72/0xdc
RIP: 0033:0x7f2d541145a7
Code: 80 f8 ff 4c 89 e0 5b 5d 41 5c c3 0f 1f 84 00 00 00 00 00 f3 0f 1e fa b8 ff ff ff 7f 48 39 c2 48 0f 47 d0 b8 d9 00 00 00 0f 05 <48> 3d 00 f0 ff ff 77 01 c3 48 8b 15 49 58 0e 00 f7 d8 64 89 02 48 
RSP: 002b:00007fff2cb9d668 EFLAGS: 00000293 ORIG_RAX: 00000000000000d9
RAX: ffffffffffffffda RBX: 00007f2d5425c040 RCX: 00007f2d541145a7
RDX: 0000000000100000 RSI: 00007f2d5425c040 RDI: 0000000000000003
RBP: 00007f2d5425c014 R08: 00007f2d5425c010 R09: 0000000000000000
R10: 0000000000000022 R11: 0000000000000293 R12: ffffffffffffff80
R13: 0000000000000000 R14: 00007f2d5425c010 R15: 0000555d32542290
 </TASK>
Kernel panic - not syncing: LBUG

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity test_425 - trevis-58vm1 crashed during sanity test_425
item.summary: sanity test_425: (lmv_obd.c:2967:stripe_dirent_load()) ASSERTION( hash <= end ) failed

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
